source.section: Part 10 - Offence: Weapons & Armament > 2 - Air-to-Ground Weapons > 2.14 - ADM-141A TALD (Tactical AIr Launched Decoy)

steps.action: Go in SMS (Stores Management System) page
Click on the OSB next to 82P to select a TALD. Pressing OSB next to STEP allows you to step between stations.
Press the Weapon Release Button (« RALT+SPACE ») to launch a TALD.
Once launched, the TALD will deploy its wings and glide for as long as it can. Radar emitters should start launching ground-to-air missiles at the decoy once they detect it.
